items.example: She has a photographic memory and never needs to take notes in class.

items.idiom: in one ear and out the other
items.translation: в одно ухо влетает, в другое вылетает
items.example: Everything I tell him goes in one ear and out the other.

items.idiom: on the tip of my tongue
items.example: Her name is on the tip of my tongue — give me a moment.
